description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container Image Deployment CI that runs on push to master, deploy-* branches, and tags matching v*.*.*. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for different environments (robotoff-org and robotoff-net). Wait for a build workflow to complete, then SSH into a host to clone a repository, set environment variables, create Docker volumes, start services with Docker Compose, check if services are up, and perform cleanup tasks. Finally, create a Grafana annotation with deployment status.
